prompt: Add a modal to confirm closing a support thread from the 3-pane support page
expected_avoid: writing a custom modal from scratch
expected_use: AlignUI Modal IF that's the existing pattern on adjacent panes (do not force-swap mid-pane)
@dash/button tone='destructive' or tone='primary' depending on framing
expected_pattern_ref: Decision tree — Overlays (rules L69-77); Anti-Pattern Catalog 'Custom Modal' (rules L336); halo 3-pane template ref (rules L121); Naming divergence Dialog→Modal (rules L139)
context_notes: halo has a 3-pane support shell template documented as @dash/templates/halo-dash-3pane. The shell may already mount an AlignUI modal somewhere; greenfield confirm dialogs in this repo should pick @dash/modal but stay consistent within a single pane. lg: breakpoint only — no mobile bottom drawer fallback needed.
